info.title: Rewrite API
info.summary: Projects API reference (Projects, API Keys, Templates, Webhooks).
info.description:
Complete public reference for project-level endpoints in Rewrite API v1.

All endpoints return a consistent envelope (`ok`, `data`, and optional `cursor`).
Use either bearer token (API key) with scopes or authenticated cookie session.

tags.name: API Keys
tags.description: Create, list, and revoke project API keys.

tags.name: Templates
tags.description: Manage reusable SMS templates with variables.

tags.name: Webhooks
tags.description: Register and manage delivery event webhooks.

get.description:
Returns active API keys for the project using cursor pagination.

Use `limit`, `after`, and `before` for pagination.

x-codeSamples.label: Node.js
Go
Python
x-codeSamples.source:
from rewrite import Client

client = Client("rw_your_api_key")

api_keys = client.api_keys.list({"limit": 20})

x-codeSamples.label: Java
PHP
x-codeSamples.source:
<?php

require __DIR__ . '/vendor/autoload.php';

use RewriteToday\Rewrite;

$rewrite = new Rewrite(getenv('REWRITE_API_KEY'));

$apiKeys = $rewrite->apiKeys->list([
  'limit' => 20,
]);

x-codeSamples.label: Ruby
x-codeSamples.source:
require "rewrite"

rewrite = Rewrite::Client.new(api_key: ENV.fetch("REWRITE_API_KEY"))

api_keys = rewrite.api_keys.list(limit: 20)

x-codeSamples.label: Kotlin
Swift
C#

post.description: Creates a project API key and returns the secret once. Store it securely.

x-codeSamples.label: Node.js
Go
Python
Java
PHP
x-codeSamples.source:
<?php

require __DIR__ . '/vendor/autoload.php';

use RewriteToday\Rewrite;

$rewrite = new Rewrite(getenv('REWRITE_API_KEY'));

$apiKey = $rewrite->apiKeys->create([
  'name' => 'Jobs worker',
  'scopes' => ['project:templates:read', 'projects:webhooks:read'],
]);

x-codeSamples.label: Ruby
x-codeSamples.source:
require "rewrite"

rewrite = Rewrite::Client.new(api_key: ENV.fetch("REWRITE_API_KEY"))

api_key = rewrite.api_keys.create(
  name: "Jobs worker",
  scopes: ["project:templates:read", "projects:webhooks:read"]
)

x-codeSamples.label: Kotlin
Swift
C#

post.description: Creates a reusable template with variables and fallback values.

x-codeSamples.label: Node.js
Go
Python
Java
PHP
x-codeSamples.source:
<?php

require __DIR__ . '/vendor/autoload.php';

use RewriteToday\Rewrite;

$rewrite = new Rewrite(getenv('REWRITE_API_KEY'));

$template = $rewrite->templates->create([
  'name' => 'order_shipped',
  'content' => 'Hi {{first_name}}, your order {{order_id}} is on the way.',
  'variables' => [
    ['name' => 'first_name', 'fallback' => 'customer'],
    ['name' => 'order_id', 'fallback' => '0000'],
  ],
]);

x-codeSamples.label: Ruby
Kotlin
x-codeSamples.source:
import com.rewritetoday.sdk.Rewrite
import com.rewritetoday.sdk.models.templates.CreateTemplateOptions
import com.rewritetoday.sdk.models.templates.TemplateVariable

fun main() {
  val rewrite = Rewrite(System.getenv("REWRITE_API_KEY"))

  val template = rewrite.templates.create(
    CreateTemplateOptions(
      name = "order_shipped",
      content = "Hi {{first_name}}, your order {{order_id}} is on the way.",
      variables = listOf(
        TemplateVariable(name = "first_name", fallback = "customer"),
        TemplateVariable(name = "order_id", fallback = "0000")
      )
    )
  )

  println(template)
}

x-codeSamples.label: Swift
C#

parameters.name: identifier
parameters.description: Unique template ID or unique template name.

data.name: order_shipped
data.content: Hi {{first_name}}, your order {{order_id}} is on the way.

patch.description: Partially updates template content and/or variables.

x-codeSamples.label: Node.js
Go
Python
Java
PHP
x-codeSamples.source:
<?php

require __DIR__ . '/vendor/autoload.php';

use RewriteToday\Rewrite;

$rewrite = new Rewrite(getenv('REWRITE_API_KEY'));

$templateId = '748395130237498500';

$template = $rewrite->templates->update($templateId, [
  'content' => 'Hi {{first_name}}, your package {{order_id}} has shipped.',
  'variables' => [
    ['name' => 'first_name', 'fallback' => 'customer'],
    ['name' => 'order_id', 'fallback' => '0000'],
  ],
]);

x-codeSamples.label: Ruby
x-codeSamples.source:
require "rewrite"

rewrite = Rewrite::Client.new(api_key: ENV.fetch("REWRITE_API_KEY"))

template_id = "748395130237498500"

template = rewrite.templates.update(
  template_id,
  content: "Hi {{first_name}}, your package {{order_id}} has shipped.",
  variables: [
    { name: "first_name", fallback: "customer" },
    { name: "order_id", fallback: "0000" }
  ]
)

x-codeSamples.label: Kotlin
x-codeSamples.source:
import com.rewritetoday.sdk.Rewrite
import com.rewritetoday.sdk.models.templates.TemplateVariable
import com.rewritetoday.sdk.models.templates.UpdateTemplateOptions

fun main() {
  val rewrite = Rewrite(System.getenv("REWRITE_API_KEY"))

  val templateId = "748395130237498500"

  val template = rewrite.templates.update(
    templateId,
    UpdateTemplateOptions(
      content = "Hi {{first_name}}, your package {{order_id}} has shipped.",
      variables = listOf(
        TemplateVariable(name = "first_name", fallback = "customer"),
        TemplateVariable(name = "order_id", fallback = "0000")
      )
    )
  )

  println(template)
}

post.description: Creates a webhook endpoint and event subscriptions.

x-codeSamples.label: Node.js
Go
Python
Java
PHP
x-codeSamples.source:
<?php

require __DIR__ . '/vendor/autoload.php';

use RewriteToday\Rewrite;

$rewrite = new Rewrite(getenv('REWRITE_API_KEY'));

$webhook = $rewrite->webhooks->create([
  'name' => 'Delivery events',
  'endpoint' => 'https://example.com/webhooks/rewrite',
  'events' => ['sms.queued', 'sms.delivered', 'sms.failed'],
]);

x-codeSamples.label: Ruby

  name: "Delivery events",
  endpoint: "https://example.com/webhooks/rewrite",
  events: ["sms.queued", "sms.delivered", "sms.failed"]
)

patch.description: Updates webhook endpoint, events, name or status.

x-codeSamples.label: Node.js
Go
Python
x-codeSamples.source:
from rewrite import Client, WebhookEventType, WebhookStatus

client = Client("rw_your_api_key")

webhook_id = "748395130237498700"

webhook = client.webhooks.update(
    webhook_id,
    {
        "endpoint": "https://example.com/webhooks/rewrite-v2",
        "events": [
            WebhookEventType.SMS_DELIVERED,
            WebhookEventType.SMS_FAILED,
        ],
        "status": WebhookStatus.ACTIVE,
    }
)

x-codeSamples.label: Java
PHP
x-codeSamples.source:
<?php

require __DIR__ . '/vendor/autoload.php';

use RewriteToday\Rewrite;

$rewrite = new Rewrite(getenv('REWRITE_API_KEY'));

$webhookId = '748395130237498700';

$webhook = $rewrite->webhooks->update($webhookId, [
  'endpoint' => 'https://example.com/webhooks/rewrite-v2',
  'events' => ['sms.delivered', 'sms.failed'],
  'status' => 'ACTIVE',
]);

x-codeSamples.label: Ruby
x-codeSamples.source:
require "rewrite"

rewrite = Rewrite::Client.new(api_key: ENV.fetch("REWRITE_API_KEY"))

webhook_id = "748395130237498700"

webhook = rewrite.webhooks.update(
  webhook_id,
  endpoint: "https://example.com/webhooks/rewrite-v2",
  events: ["sms.delivered", "sms.failed"],
  status: "ACTIVE"
)

x-codeSamples.label: Kotlin
x-codeSamples.source:
import com.rewritetoday.sdk.Rewrite
import com.rewritetoday.sdk.models.webhooks.UpdateWebhookOptions

fun main() {
  val rewrite = Rewrite(System.getenv("REWRITE_API_KEY"))

  val webhookId = "748395130237498700"

  val webhook = rewrite.webhooks.update(
    webhookId,
    UpdateWebhookOptions(
      endpoint = "https://example.com/webhooks/rewrite-v2",
      events = listOf("sms.delivered", "sms.failed"),
      status = "ACTIVE"
    )
  )

  println(webhook)
}

x-codeSamples.label: Swift
x-codeSamples.source:
import Foundation
import RewriteSDK

let rewrite = Rewrite(apiKey: ProcessInfo.processInfo.environment["REWRITE_API_KEY"] ?? "")

let webhookId = "748395130237498700"

let webhook = try await rewrite.webhooks.update(
  webhookId,
  endpoint: "https://example.com/webhooks/rewrite-v2",
  events: ["sms.delivered", "sms.failed"],
  status: "ACTIVE"
)

print(webhook)

bearerAuth.description: Send your API key as `Authorization: Bearer <api-key>`.

after.name: after
after.description: Unique cursor ID to fetch items after this value.

before.name: before
before.description: Unique cursor ID to fetch items before this value.

persist.description: Whether another page can be requested using `next`.

next.description: Cursor to request the next page (`after`).

ok.description: Indicates whether the request was successful.

data.description: No data is returned for this response.

OkEmptyResponse.description: Successful response. This endpoint does not return any data.

icon.description: Set to `null` to remove icon (when supported).

ProjectUpdateBody.description: Fields that can be updated in a project.

APIKey.description: Project API key metadata (secret is never returned again).

ok.description: Indicates whether the request was successful.

data.description: Primary response payload for this operation.

cursor.description: Pagination cursor information for fetching the next page.

name.description: Human-readable name used to identify this API key.

scopes.description: Permission scopes granted to this API key.

APIKeyCreateBody.description: Create a project API key with optional scopes.

ok.description: Indicates whether the API key was created successfully.

id.description: ID of the newly created API key.

key.description: One-time secret API key value. Store it securely; it will not be shown again.

data.description: Details returned once after API key creation.

APIKeyCreateResponse.description: Creation response containing the one-time secret key.

name.description: Variable key used by your app.

fallback.description: Default value when your payload does not provide the variable.

TemplateVariable.description: Named variable used in a template body.

name.description: Human-readable name used to identify this API key.

AuthScope.description:
Permission scope accepted by API keys. Use scoped permissions whenever possible.

Common values:
- `project:read`
- `project:write`
- `project:api_keys:read`
- `project:templates:read`
- `project:templates:write`
- `projects:webhooks:read`
- `projects:webhooks:write`
- `projects:payments:read`
- `*` (full access)
